pages.label: Cover and charge
pages.text: RESTRICTED — PROSECUTION DISCLOSURE BUNDLE URN: 26/DA/006 Defendant: Ava Quinn Court: Westbridge Magistrates' Court === SECTION: COVER_INDEX === INDEX Document | Pages | Note Charge sheet | 1 | MG5 case summary | 2-3 | MG6C disclosure schedule | 4 | MG11 complainant statement (draft unsigned) | 5-6 | Screenshot and message pack | 7-8 | Exhibit list | 9 | Police note — attribution | 10 | Court listing | 11 | === SECTION: CHARGE === R v Ava Quinn Statement of Offence: Stalking involving fear of violence, contrary to section 4A of the Protection from Harassment Act 1997 Particulars of Offence: Between 1 February 2026 and 20 April 2026 pursued Jordan Hale on at least two occasions causing fear of  violence.

pages.label: MG5 (1/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT URN: 26/DA/006 Anticipated Plea: Not Guilty Officer in case: DC Shaw 3312 Headline Summary The prosecution relies on a served screenshot and message pack, a phone extraction summary, and complainant  account. Full phone download, subscriber data, and final signed MG11 are outstanding. Attribution is asserted  in police papers but not fully proved on current disclosure.

pages.label: MG5 (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === Domestic context noted in complainant account — full digital attribution still required before sender identity is  safely confirmed. Evidence on file (served) Charge sheet; MG5; MG6C schedule; draft complainant MG11; screenshot/message pack (AQ/01); exhibit list;  police attribution note. Evidence referred or outstanding Full phone download/source export; subscriber/account data; full message export; call logs; device-level  extraction metadata; final signed MG11.

pages.label: MG6C schedule
pages.text: === SECTION: MG6 === MG6C — UNUSED MATERIAL SCHEDULE MG6C/001 — Phone extraction summary — served (summary only; source download outstanding). MG6C/002 — Screenshot and message pack AQ/01 — served on bundle. MG6C/003 — Subscriber/account data — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/004 — Full phone download / source export — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/005 — Call logs — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/006 — Device metadata export — referred on MG6C — not attached. MG6C/007 — Final signed complainant MG11 — outstanding — draft only on bundle. MG6C/008 — Full message export (native format) — referred on MG6C — not attached.

pages.label: MG11 complainant (draft)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG11 === MG11 — COMPLAINANT STATEMENT (draft unsigned) I am Jordan Hale. Between January and March 2026 I received persistent messages on WhatsApp and SMS  from a number I did not recognise.

pages.label: MG11 complainant (cont.)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG11 === I saved screenshots exhibited as AQ/01. Police told me a phone was seized from Ava Quinn. I have not seen the  full phone download and cannot say who typed each message without subscriber/account records. Statement not yet signed — final MG11 outstanding.

pages.label: Screenshot/message pack (1/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: SCREENSHOTS === EXHIBIT AQ/01 — SCREENSHOT AND MESSAGE PACK (served) Pack reference: DFU/AQ/2026 Note: Screenshots served. Full extraction source file not attached. --- Screenshot 1 (WhatsApp) --- From: +44 7700 900206 "I know where you work"

pages.label: Screenshot/message pack (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: SCREENSHOTS === --- Screenshot 2 (SMS) --- From: +44 7700 900206 "Answer me" --- Extraction summary (served summary only) --- DFU summary: partial extraction completed. Full download referred on MG6C/004 — not attached. Subscriber identity: not on bundle (MG6C/003 outstanding).

pages.label: Exhibit list
pages.text: === SECTION: EXHIBIT_LIST === EXHIBIT LIST — R v Ava Quinn (26/DA/006) AQ/01 — Screenshot and message pack — SERVED — pages 7-8 AQ/02 — Phone extraction summary — SERVED (summary only) AQ/03 — Draft complainant MG11 — SERVED (unsigned) AQ/04 — Subscriber/account data — NOT SERVED AQ/05 — Full phone download — NOT SERVED

pages.label: Police note — attribution
pages.text: === SECTION: POLICE_NOTE === POLICE NOTE — DIGITAL ATTRIBUTION (DC Shaw 3312) Screenshot pack AQ/01 is served. Attribution of sender identity for +44 7700 900206 is asserted but NOT fully  proved: subscriber/account data and full phone download are outstanding.

pages.label: Listing
pages.text: === SECTION: LISTING === PTPH listed — 18 August 2026, 10:00, Westbridge Magistrates' Court, Court 3.

=== SECTION: MG5 === MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT URN: 26/DA/006 Anticipated Plea: Not Guilty Officer in case: DC Shaw 3312 Headline Summary The prosecution relies on a served screenshot and message pack, a phone extraction summary, and complainant  account. Full phone download, subscriber data, and final signed MG11 are outstanding. Attribution is asserted  in police papers but not fully proved on current disclosure.
